description: The SAP Business One Production & MRP connector provides APIs for the production and MRP objects of SAP Business One: bills of materials, production orders, resources, and forecasts, exposed through the [SAP Business One Service Layer](https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_BUSINESS_ONE_ONE_BRANCH) (OData).
key-features: Create, release, and close production orders
Maintain resources, capacities, and routing stages
